raw_consumer_statement:
On or about XX/XX/year> XXXX pd a law firm under the name of XXXX XXXX XXXX, the main owner was the one who visited with me, i used to see her firm on XXXX and after following the firm i noticed she was always as if traveling and at other times she advertised her legal services i felt somewhat confident in that her firm might possibly be able to assist, there was a XXXX ad that stated she would have a conferance about XXXX  XXXX on XXXX  XXXX and XXXX  was one of her topics at the XXXX XXXX. I asked her for a bus card and she assured me she could help me in a legal matter. 

After this i did visitthe firm and siged up for legal services however the firm never acted in my best interest, seeing things much more clearer now i see i was not provided services or sound legal counsel. 

I was a victim many yrs ago of a crime/s and rather than help me she stated i could file a divorce option however i feel this was not accurate in that a sham wedding is not a true marriage i was a minor in a foreign country at the time of the crime and i truly feel the firm never did what i hired them to do. 

i have begged for my monies it is not about the monies it is about ethics and the firm and the supposed atty XXXX XXXX XXXX sent me an email offering me free money in exchange for me to quote forego a negative review and what i understood not to file a compalint with the XXXX of XXXX. 

The complaint is against credit card company American Express and the firm who accepted monies is XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX my monies because i should not have to pay one single cent for this miscarriage of justice, in certified letters i asked the firm to stop working on my cases they refuse to let the case go thus running up additional legl fees. 

American Express has truly been not helpful they have recordings of how i have been affected i have recording too where the American express is not freindly in fact it feels like some psychological torment they have put me thru the most recent time. 

Anyhow i have reported it to internet crimes because this supposed attorney is sending emails with a cut and paste font and no true header it is suspicious. At first he directed me to firm paralegal who quote was handling this then continues to send emails i am not going to respond tothe firm until i get assistance from this dept.
